entities.name: CHICKPEA
entities.description: An important pulse crop grown during the rabi season in Punjab state.

entities.name: KABULI GRAM
entities.description: A type of chickpea characterized by bold seeds and higher market price.

entities.name: L 552
entities.description: A new bold seeded variety of kabuli gram developed from GLK 95091 x PBG 68.

entities.name: GLK 95091
entities.description: A parent line used in the cross to develop the L 552 variety.

entities.name: PBG 68
entities.description: A parent line used in the cross to develop the L 552 variety.

entities.name: RABI SEASON
entities.description: The winter cropping season in which chickpea is grown.

entities.name: PUNJAB STATE
entities.description: The Indian state where chickpea is grown and L 552 is recommended.

entities.name: HIGH YIELDING
entities.description: A desired breeding objective for kabuli gram varieties to increase productivity.

entities.name: BOLD SEEDED
entities.description: A desired breeding objective for kabuli gram varieties to fetch higher market prices.

entities.name: PEDIGREE METHOD OF SELECTION
entities.description: The breeding method used to develop the L 552 variety.

entities.name: IRRIGATED AREAS
entities.description: The specific environmental condition in Punjab state where L 552 is recommended for cultivation.
